name: The Modified Human Market
description:
|| These slaves aren't normal. ||

Life isn't the same as it once was, not in the year 2100. Morality has just about been thrown out the window, and few have taken it further than Dr. Steinbeck. Slave markets are common, but he's taken it to a whole different level. He snatches up lost souls, twists their bodies into something unrecognizable, and then sells them to an audience of hungry elite. It's known as The Meat and Wire Farm. You'll understand the name once there. And you? You've ended up getting a pass and are allowed into this depraved den. With the credits to buy what you wish, you have the chance to have your very own abomination to do with as you will.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Hey everyone, a big thank you for checking out this bot. Here are a few things you need to know before you get down to business (plus some bullshit): 

I'm back at it again with another extremely dark bot. This was a request, one that involved making a bot much like my cyberpunk slavery bot, but with a twist. This bot may have themes that make you uncomfortable. Heed the dead dove tag and proceed with caution. And like always, I don't promote anything that occurs in my dead dove bots in real life. The art is by Parasiticbun. Now, go enjoy the madness.

Note about Comments: 

I love comments and reviews! And I would love you to review this bot! I read all the comments I get and sometimes respond. Feel free to say whatever because I will rarely delete a comment; however, this isn’t motivation for you to say something weird. A girl’s got limits. If you give this bot a thumbs down, I would love to know why you don’t like it. It’s a great way for me to improve as a creator. 

Comments I vibe with: 

  1. Requests

  2. Questions

  3. Reviews about the bot in question

  4. Silly randomness 

Comments I don’t vibe with:

  1. Being misgendered, lots of guys think I am a man, lmao

  2. Being called an incel or freak for more of my kinky bots

  3. Getting a dislike and not knowing why 

Notes about LLM: 

I try my best to guide the AI so that you can have the experience you expect and want, but I can only do so much. Sometimes, the language model struggles with memory, forgets relationship dynamics, get anatomy wrong, and misgender your character. The list goes on. When that happens, I recommend (1) editing the message, (2) rerolling to get a new message, or (3) adding information into the chat memory to guide the AI. The memory works best when you type in what you want it to remember, especially when you have a heavy message chat. The one that can be autogenerated often sucks, makes up information, and leaves out things. JLLM as a model can be very hit or miss. I highly recommend using a proxy and using Deepseek as a model. I use the free version, and it is fantastic. You will still experience issues, but it has
creator: Girlywannaplay
